message:
feat(extras): thread-local buffer pooling for visual FX render buffers

Adds a thread-local BUFFER_POOL for Vec<PackedRgba> render buffers to
avoid per-frame allocation churn in Backdrop and StackedFx widgets.
Pool capped at 16 entries with acquire_buffer/release_buffer API.
Drop implementations on StackedFx and Backdrop return buffers to the pool.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
